title: 12 Sheets Christmas Wrapping Paper - 70x50cm Thick Kraft Gift Wrap Set with 10m Jute Twine & 10 Tags - 10 Rustic Designs (Reindeer, Snowman, Typography) - Recyclable Folded Paper for Xmas Presents
features: Complete Rustic Wrapping Kit: Everything you need for a vintage-style Christmas! This value pack includes 12 sheets of kraft wrapping paper (70cm x 50cm), 10 metres of rustic jute twine, and 10 gift tags. No need to buy extra accessories—create stunning, coordinated parcels straight out of the pack.

10 Assorted Festive Designs: Never get bored with our mixed selection. You will receive 10 distinct patterns, featuring classic Red Reindeers, Snowmen Patchwork, Snowflakes, Ornaments, and "Merry Christmas" typography. Note: You get 1 sheet of each design, plus an extra sheet of the popular Red Reindeer and Snowman Patchwork patterns (12 sheets total).

Premium Thick Kraft Paper: Made from high-quality, durable kraft paper, these sheets are thick enough to hide your gifts completely (no peeking!) but flexible enough to fold crisp corners. The matte finish gives your presents a trendy, traditional, and warm look compared to shiny foil paper.

Eco-Friendly & Recyclable: Wrap your gifts guilt-free. Our brown kraft paper is 100% recyclable and biodegradable, unlike glittery or metallic wraps. Combined with the natural jute string, this set is the perfect choice for an eco-conscious Christmas in the UK.

Folded for Convenience: Each sheet measures 70cm x 50cm, ideal for wrapping books, toy boxes, and medium-sized gifts. The sheets come folded flat (not on a roll) for easy storage in a drawer until the big day arrives.
